Vel'Koz.trading_pattern: Vel'Koz outranges significantly. Farm safely with E.
Vel'Koz.mid_game: Use ult for teamfight engagement. Scale with team.
Vel'Koz.late_game: He outscales in poke. Use ult for teamfights.
Vel'Koz.scaling: Vel'Koz outscales — his poke is oppressive late

Veigar.trading_pattern: Veigar stacks early. Trade before stacks accumulate.
Veigar.early_game: Abuse before stacks. Poke with Q.
Veigar.mid_game: Use ult to engage. Avoid his cage.
Veigar.late_game: He outscales. Use ult for teamfights.
Veigar.win_condition: Abuse early before stacks. Use ult for teamfights.
Veigar.scaling: Veigar significantly outscales — stacking makes him oppressive
Veigar.positioning: Avoid his cage. Use ult for engagement.

Annie.trading_pattern: Annie has burst. Trade when stun down.
Annie.ability_to_dodge: Annie Q — dodge by moving away.
Annie.mid_game: Use ult to engage teamfights. Scale with team.
Annie.late_game: Both scale similarly. Teamfights determine outcome.
Annie.win_condition: Use ult to engage and chain teamfights.
Annie.scaling: Neeko slightly favored — your ult utility is superior
Annie.positioning: Keep distance. Use ult for teamfights.

Smolder.trading_pattern: Smolder weak early. Spam E poke and farm.
Smolder.early_game: Dominate with E poke. Control lane.
Smolder.mid_game: Maintain pressure. Don't let him scale.
Smolder.win_condition: Get early lead. Finish before he scales.
Smolder.scaling: Smolder significantly outscales — you need major lead
